terms_conditions_guidelines: Any misdescription or misdeclaration by customers will be charged of Cargo Misdeclaration Fee, please login our web site(https://www.yangming.com/ )} by your ID/password and refer to our customer advisory Charge of Cargo Misdeclaration Fee under [News] / [Customer Advisory].
The Containers can be picked up by the Shipper or your nominated agent or transporter from the nominated yard by submitting a copy of this Booking Confirmation
Ensure the empty container received from our yard is in clean and sound condition. No claims will be entertained thereafter. Costs for any subsequent rejection will be to your account.
Any Loss or damage to the container while in custody of shipper, transporter, and forwarder shall be fully identified for repair /replacement / reimbursement as noticed by owner /hirer.

Shipper /Forwarder will fully Indemnify the line from any claims for costs, charges, legal expenses, arising from death or injury while in the possession of the shipper/ forwarder/ transporter or their agents.
As per terminal guidelines, all container doors are to be facing the aft of the trailers while offloading, failing which any additional cost incurred will be at your account

Original Shipping Bill/ Original EIR/ Original VGM declaration/ Weighment Slip must be submitted to our office soon after container offloaded at CY (Vessel Slot) else Container will not be loaded in planned Vessel/ Voyage.
At YANG MING we follow no VGM- No Form 13 Policy strictly For VGM details please visit www.yml.in
Ensure the Roof Bows/Tarpaulin/TIR Cord are intact prior pickup the Equipment.
Ensure to furnish Survey Report/Photos prior request for form 13.
